summary: Implemented ADR 0212 from an isolated worktree on top of the latest `origin/main`, published the governed replaceability scorecards and vendor exit plans to `docs.example.com` through the shared edge publication flow, recovered the shared lane by regenerating the missing changelog portal artifact, and verified the deployed ADR 0212 and ADR 0042 pages end to end.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_interface_contracts.py tests/test_replaceability_scorecards.py tests/test_scaffold_service.py tests/test_validate_repo_cache.py -q` passed with `18 passed in 1.55s`; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` returned `Repository data models OK`; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh architecture-fitness agent-standards workstream-surfaces` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-portals` both passed from the isolated worktree.

The first `make deploy-docs-portal BOOTSTRAP_KEY=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519` run from commit `9d1e75f2` built and copied `docs-portal` but failed because the shared `nginx_edge_publication` role also expected `build/changelog-portal/`; following the repo-documented recovery with `make generate-ops-portal`, `make generate-changelog-portal`, `make docs`, and `make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed successfully with `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=14`.

On 2026-03-28, `curl -Ik https://docs.example.com/` and `curl -Ik https://docs.example.com/architecture/decisions/0212-replaceability-scorecards-and-vendor-exit-plans/` both returned `HTTP/2 302` to `https://docs.example.com/oauth2/sign_in?...` with `X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow` and the expected HSTS, CORP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and CSP headers.

The local and deployed SHA-256 digests matched for ADR 0212 (`7319105f91bcf2a02a1bea482512bc8d49c6a1db17e7eaec5846bcaebd6343e1`) and ADR 0042 (`456d6c9a5e4c7fdfc19997226fc8a1ec6109f55faa38509bdecda7e4c4a1e53c`) HTML pages, and an Ansible shell probe on `nginx-lv3` confirmed both deployed files contain `Replaceability Scorecard` and `Vendor Exit Plan`.

notes: The first branch-local `make deploy-docs-portal` attempt already rsynced the updated docs portal before failing on the missing shared changelog artifact, so the final replay followed the existing recovery path documented in `docs/runbooks/configure-plane.md` and `docs/runbooks/configure-edge-publication.md`.

Protected merge-to-main work remains intentionally deferred on this workstream branch: update `VERSION`, update the release sections in `changelog.md`, refresh the top-level `README.md` integrated status summary only if desired at integration time, and update `versions/stack.yaml` only on the final verified mainline commit.
